title: China calls U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz 'dangerous and irresponsible'
snippet: China escalates rhetoric from 'urges restraint' to calling blockade 'dangerous and irresponsible act'. China warned blockade risks undermining 'already fragile ceasefire'. China imports 80% of Iran's shipped oil (1.4 mb/d). Holds ~1 billion barrels strategic reserves.
tag_reason: 업데이트 — 4/13 '자제 촉구'에서 '위험하고 무책임' 수사 격상, 새로운 수치 포함
